stemHtml: Consider a large jet transport aeroplane under Performance Class A. For any given take-off, the Performance-Limited Take-Off Mass (PLTOM) is limited by brake-energy or tyre-speed limits...

options.a: to ensure that V2 is greater than VMBE.
options.b: to ensure that V1 is less than or equal to VMBE.
options.c: when V<sub>R</sub> is less than V<sub>MAX TYRE</sub>.
options.d: when V<sub>LOF</sub> is less than V<sub>MAX TYRE</sub>.
